hero.title: Your wedding celebration, organized in one place
hero.subtitle: Partiiu is the event manager made for weddings—from the first save-the-date to the last toast. Perfect for couples who want clarity; powerful enough for planners and producers.

value.title: Why Partiiu
value.body: Spreadsheets, endless group chats, and scattered tools make wedding planning stressful. Partiiu brings your timeline, guest experience, products, and invitations together so everyone stays aligned—without losing the magic of the day.

features.title: Built for how weddings really run

events.title: Events & programs
events.desc: Create your wedding as an event hub and keep every detail under control.

schedules.title: Timeline & schedules
schedules.desc: Line up ceremonies, receptions, and logistics so vendors and ushers know what happens when.

products.title: Products & orders
products.desc: Sell experiences, add-ons, or tickets and track orders in one flow.

invites.title: Digital invitations
invites.desc: Invite guests, track status, and keep communication clear before the big day.

guests.title: Guest lists & RSVP
guests.desc: Manage who is coming and give guests a smooth path to respond and participate.

guestExperience.title: Guest experience
guestExperience.desc: Share links that feel polished—confirmations, access, and day-of details without friction.

step1.title: Create your wedding event
step1.desc: Set up the celebration as your central workspace.

step2.title: Build schedule, products & invites
step2.desc: Add the program, what you offer guests, and who you want there.

step3.title: Track confirmations & orders
step3.desc: Stay on top of RSVP and sales so there are fewer surprises.

social.title: Stories from couples and teams
social.body: We’re just getting started—real testimonials and partners will appear here as more celebrations run on Partiiu.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Couples organizing their own wedding and professionals—planners, producers, venues—who need one place to coordinate the event.
faq.q2: Is Partiiu a wedding website builder like iCasei?
faq.a2: Partiiu focuses on event operations: schedules, guest experience, invitations, products, and orders. It complements—or replaces—scattered spreadsheets and chats; it is not a full consumer wedding-site product.
faq.q3: Can guests buy or confirm without creating an account?
faq.a3: Flows depend on how you configure invitations and products; Partiiu is designed so guests interact through clear links and guided steps.
faq.q4: How do you handle data and privacy?
faq.a4: We treat guest and couple data seriously. Use strong passwords, verify email, and check your account security settings. Detailed policies can be published on your site as you formalize them.
faq.a5: Pricing may evolve—create an account to see what is available today or reach out via contact below.
faq.a6: Use the contact channel in the footer for product questions. In-app help may expand over time.

ctaBand.title: Ready to plan with less noise?
ctaBand.subtitle: Create your account and set up your first wedding event in minutes.
